rationale: The citation is used in the methods section to justify how the focal construct (intrinsic brand strength) is operationalized, not merely as general background. The authors explicitly reference Slotegraaf et al. (2003) as prior precedent for evaluating baseline sales at a minimum-marketing-support level (set to zero for some instruments), which feeds into their core model setup. Although the paper does not build on the cited paper's resource-moderation theory, it meaningfully adopts a measurement convention from it.
relation_description: The citing paper applies a methodological precedent from Slotegraaf et al. (2003) when constructing its intrinsic brand strength metric from baseline sales under minimum marketing support assumptions.
